partial_progress.details: Applied M reflexivity case split to Case B2. Non-reflexive M cases now proven. All remaining sorries share single root cause: M reflexive makes witness equivalent to endpoint. Pattern C iteration required.

completion_data.completion_summary: Reduced sorries from 13 to 12 by proving M non-reflexive cases in Case B2 using irreflexivity witness propagation. Discovered seriality_escape is not directly provable - Pattern C iteration needed.
